title: Market Square
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, bustling medieval market square under war banners, ration queues, militia patrols, cinematic, no text
description:
War has changed the market. There are still apples and bolts of cloth, but now there are ration lines and whispered prices.

Runners weave between carts. A bell tolls from the direction of the council hall.

title: Docks Ward
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, rainy medieval docks ward, tarpaulins, lantern light, wary dockhands, cinematic, no text
description:
The docks never sleep — they just change what they’re guilty of.

Tarpaulins snap in the wind. Lanterns show too many shadows moving in the wrong direction.

title: Drain Grate
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, iron drain grate in cobbles, runoff water, faint green light below, cinematic, no text
description:
The grate is newer than the stones around it. Someone has been here recently — the bolts are scratched and the iron is warm.

A smell rises: rot, river-mud, and secrets.

title: Outer Gate
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, massive city outer gate with iron bands, soldiers and barricades, storm clouds, cinematic, no text
description:
The outer gate is a mouth held shut by fear and iron.

Beyond it: fields, farms, timber tracks — and whatever is bold enough to test the walls.

title: Grain Store
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, city granary interior, stacked sacks, dust motes in light beams, nervous clerks, cinematic, no text
description:
Sacks are stacked like miniature fortifications. A clerk watches you as if you might steal the concept of bread.

Outside, someone shouts that another cart is overdue.

title: Farm Road Edge
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, muddy farm road leaving the city, hedges, distant scarecrows, watchful sky, cinematic, no text
description:
The city shrinks behind you. Ahead: hedges, fields, and the uneasy quiet that comes before trouble.

The road forks toward farms and timber tracks.

title: Ditch Path
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, narrow ditch path with wet reeds, footprints, low fog, cinematic, no text
description:
A narrow path runs along a drainage ditch. The reeds are bent the wrong way — like something pushed through in a hurry.

It’s good cover. It’s also a good place to get cornered.

title: Timber Track
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, timber track with cut logs, axe marks, distant treeline, cinematic, no text
description:
The track is chewed up by carts. Fresh axe chips glitter like pale coins.

If raiders wanted lumber, they’d come this way. If you wanted to ambush someone, you’d wait here.

title: Hedge Crossing
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, hedgerow gap with broken branches, muddy bootprints, crows watching, cinematic, no text
description:
A break in the hedge — too neat to be natural.

The ground is churned by boots. Whoever came through wasn’t strolling.

title: Siege Workshop
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, siege workshop with winches, gears, pitch pots, carpenters and smiths, cinematic, no text
description:
Every tool here is a reply to a future scream.

Winches, beams, pitch pots — the city’s hands are building what its mouth refuses to say out loud.

title: Cistern Run
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, ancient cistern tunnel, knee-deep water, mossy stone, torch reflections, cinematic, no text
description:
Water whispers along stonework older than the city.

Footprints smear in the algae — recent. Someone has been using the cistern runs as a road.
